PETITIONER RICHARD IDELL, A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ATTORNEY-CLIENT FEE ARBITRATION AWARD AS JUDGMENT.

APPEARANCES: Ory Sandel, Esq. of Idell & Seitel LLP 986-2400 for petitioner & moving party; no other appearances.
